array.string: sleep 10 && export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH && tmux kill-session -t claude-telegram 2>/dev/null; tmux new-session -d -s claude-telegram "export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH && yes | claude --channels plugin:telegram@claude-plugins-official --dangerously-skip-permissions --permission-mode bypassPermissions"
